productDisplayName: Scullers Men Red & Blue Check Shirt
description: CompositionRed and blue plaid shirt with white accents made of 100% cotton, with full sleeves, full length  buttoned placket, patch pocket on left chest and a curved hemlineWash care Pre-soak the garment before wash Wash inside out with zippers and buttons fastened Preferably hand washed Use only mild detergents Wash dark colours separately Do not attempt to remove stains by spot washing Drip dry on hanger and avoid wringing Flat dry Preferably steam iron This red and blue plaid shirt from scullers is a great addition to your wardrobe.  The red and blue combo gives off an energetic vibe. Pair this shirt with denims or chinos and semi-formal leather shoes for a cool casual look. Size and FitRelaxed fitThe model (height 6' and shoulder 18") is wearing a size 40
